pr.title: ClownCar: Frugendorff compression baseline + canonical DeltaNet integration

output.summary: Shares one crawler block per loop with flow-conditioned instructions and plugs in canonical DeltaNet kernels for a compact recurrent transformer compression.
techniques: Flow-conditioned loop perturbations for iterative refinement
Weight-shared crawler executed four times with unique flat encoder/decoder ends
Canonical DeltaNet chunked kernel replacing Python token loops
